M

machine - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.Game
 
MACHINE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.player.Turn
The machine player is choosing where to fire next.

The machine's board.
MACHINE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D.Turn
The camera should be hovering over the machine's board.
MACHINE_AZIMUTH - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
 
MACHINE_SHOT_DELAY - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
Pause before each machine shot.

The computer-controlled opponent (HU-4).

Main - Class in com.example.battleship
Application entry point.
Main() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.Main
 
mainGameController - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
MainGameController - Class in com.example.battleship.controller
The single entry point that wires the whole game together.
MainGameController(Game, BattlefieldView3D, Node) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
Resumes an already-in-progress game loaded from disk (HU-5).
MainGameController(String, BattlefieldView3D, Node) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
Starts a brand-new game at HU-1.
markAsInvalidPreview() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
Recolors the whole hull red, for showing this ship as a preview that can't actually be placed here.
markAsPreview() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
Recolors the whole hull to a flat, semi-bright "ghost" material, for showing this ship as a placement preview.
markHit(int) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
Marks one cell of the ship as hit.
markSunk() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
Sinks the ship: removes the individual per-cell hit markers and recolors the whole hull in a single pass, so the result is always the complete ship silhouette in the "sunk" material -- never a grid-chopped patchwork.
MAST_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
 
MAST_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
 
MAST_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
 
MAX_ATTEMPTS_PER_SHIP - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.FleetPlacer
Safety cap so a pathological run of bad luck fails loudly instead of looping forever.
MAX_ELEVATION - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
Degrees.
MAX_RADIUS - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
 
MIN_ELEVATION - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
Degrees.
MIN_RADIUS - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
 
MISS - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.board.CellState
Shot at, and there was no ship here.
moveTargetInstantly(Point3D) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
Places OrbitCameraRig3D.targetPivot directly at target, with no animation -- used only for the rig's initial position.
moveToCell(int, int) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.HoverMarker3D
Moves the ring to sit over the given cell and makes it visible.
